diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, Hono
+- Reads as: TypeScript class and factory functions
+- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/hono-base/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core factory for creating Hono app instances with extensible plugin hooks
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Route inspection utilities for getting matched route paths
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/url.ts, src/context/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Utilities for inspecting matched routes and route path resolution
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: WebSocket upgrade handler with typed event interfaces
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/utils/http-status.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper with typed context and event handlers
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, generateCookie
+- Reads as: Cookie read/write utilities with signed support
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper functions for setting and reading cookies with optional signing
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: Test client factory for Hono applications
+- Neighbor files: src/client/index.ts, src/types.ts
+- Safe summary: Creates test client instance for testing Hono applications
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, Runtime type
+- Reads as: Runtime detection and environment variable extraction
+- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment and provides typed environment access
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, rawCssString, ClassNameSlug
+- Reads as: CSS-in-JS style utilities for Hono JSX
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/jsx/dom/css.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for styled JSX components with class name management
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, rawCssString, Symbol keys for CSS metadata
+- Reads as: Core types and utils for CSS helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared symbols and constants used by CSS helper
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: HTTP proxy function with header filtering
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch handler that removes hop-by-hop headers
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Development utilities for inspecting app routes
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/color.ts, src/utils/handler.ts, src/router/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Route inspection helpers for development mode
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: HTML templating with callback support
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML template helper with escape and raw content handling
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG (re-exports)
+- Reads as: SSG helper exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Main export file for Static Site Generation helpers
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, generateRoutes, FileSystemModule, ToSSGResult
+- Reads as: SSG generation logic with file write support
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/utils/mime.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG generation engine that renders pages to static files
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, isDynamicRoute, filterStaticGenerateRoutes
+- Reads as: Path utilities for SSG route handling
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/handler.ts
+- Safe summary: Path manipulation utilities specifically for SSG
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGParams
+- Reads as: Middleware for SSG request context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG context middleware for tracking static generation requests
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText (re-exports)
+- Reads as: Streaming API exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Main export file for streaming responses
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: Generic streaming API with chunked response support
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Base streaming API for chunked content delivery
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: Server-Sent Events streaming implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/html.ts
+- Safe summary: SSE streaming helper with event formatting and error handling
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: Plain text streaming wrapper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/context/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Streams plain text responses with proper headers
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts (re-export)
+- Reads as: Accept header parsing export
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Safe summary: Main export for accept header matching
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, defaultMatch
+- Reads as: Accept header matching with quality value sorting
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/accept.ts
+- Safe summary: Matches Accept headers and returns best-supported type
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo (re-expo
